# TokenMessageERC20

```
{ "cmd": "encodeTokenMessageERC20"
, "arg":
  { "recipient": "recipient"
  , "amount": 23
  }
}
```

```
{ "cmd": "decodeTokenMessageERC20"
, "arg":
  { "encodedMessage": "AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAFwAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAJcmVjaXBpZW50AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA="
  }
}
```


# TokenMessageERC721


```
{ "cmd": "encodeTokenMessageERC721"
, "arg":
  { "recipient": "recipient1"
  , "tokenId": 12
  , "metadata": "metadata2"
  }
}
```

```
{ "cmd": "decodeTokenMessageERC721"
, "arg":
  { "encodedMessage": ""
  }
}
```

# HyperlaneMessage

```
{ "cmd": "encodeHyperlaneMessage"
, "arg":
  { "version": 1
  , "nonce": 1223
  , "originDomain": 7
  , "sender": "MTIzNDU2Nzg5MDEyMzQ1Njc4OTAxMjM0NTY3ODkwMTI="
  , "destinationDomain": 8
  , "recipient": "MjIzNDU2Nzg5MDEyMzQ1Njc4OTAxMjM0NTY3ODkwMTI="
  , "messageBody": "" # TokenMessageERC721
  }
}
```

```
{ "cmd": "decodeHyperlaneMessage"
, "arg":
  { "encodedMessage": ""
  }
}
```

# verify

```
{ "cmd": "verify"
, "arg":
  { "encodedMessage": ""
  , "encodedMetadata": "b3JpZ2luTWVya2xlVHJlZUFkZHJlc3MAAAAAAAAAAABtZXJrbGVSb290AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAD=="
  }
}
```

returns

```
{ "addresses": ["0x23dc3567f7376b1b1e8bbc0513ff0417ab5adbd0"] }
```

# pact

```
(verify-spv "HYPERLANE_V3" {...}) # pass an object like from the examples above
```
